message:
feat(scheduler): add exponential backoff before worker parking

Implement spin-yield-park backoff sequence in both Worker and
ThreeLaneWorker to reduce latency from park/unpark syscalls when
new work arrives shortly after a worker becomes idle:

- worker.rs: Replace immediate park() with a 3-phase backoff loop:
  spin_loop() for SPIN_LIMIT (64) iterations, yield_now() for
  YIELD_LIMIT (16) iterations, then park(). Checks local and global
  queues between iterations to break early on new work.

- three_lane.rs: Same backoff pattern applied to ThreeLaneWorker.
  Checks global queue length in spin loop to detect new work.

- local_queue.rs: Add is_empty() method to LocalQueue for efficient
  emptiness checks during backoff without popping.

- tests/scheduler_backoff.rs: Integration test verifying the backoff
  behavior with concurrent task injection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
